description: An official event photograph (a candid documentary shot, not a designed meme graphic) of President Trump on a stage during a state visit to China. Trump stands at a carved wooden lectern with a microphone and a small floral arrangement, wearing a dark suit and red tie; to the left, an aide in a dark suit stands holding an object. Behind them is a large orange/red LED video wall displaying the event branding: the U.S. and Chinese national flags side by side, Chinese characters reading a welcome message above the English words 'WELCOMING BANQUET,' the location 'BEIJING, CHINA' (with Chinese characters above it), and the date in Chinese and English 'MAY 14, 2026.' The hall has traditional Chinese painted architectural detailing along the top. The on-screen text is part of the venue's event signage rather than an agency-applied graphic overlay, and there is no White House seal, slogan, or meme styling added to the image. The tweet pairs it with a Trump quote about the U.S.-China relationship.
notable_text: WELCOMING BANQUET | BEIJING, CHINA | MAY 14, 2026 (event venue signage on LED wall)
